chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1405 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 3 a/w reply as at A. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.12.2025. Mr. Ahmed Ali Gabol, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zahoor Shah, DPG Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Mastoi, AAG a/w Ghulam Shabbir DSP, Inspector Zahid Hussain, PI Qasim PS New Town and PI M. Javed CIA --------- Learned counsel for the petitioner through instant petition seeks following relief:- “a. Direct Respondents, particularly Respondent Nos. 7 & 8, not to lodge, register, or cause to be registered any false or frivolous FIR or complaint against the Petitioner or his family in future. b. Restrain all Respondents from harassing, intimidating, or threatening the Petitioner or any member of his family, and direct them to ensure their safety in accordance with law. c. Direct Respondent Nos. 1 to 3 to furnish details of any FIR(s), if lodged or pending against the Petitioner, in any police station within the Province of Sindh. d. Grant any other relief which this Hon'ble Court may deem fit, just, equitable, and appropriate in the circumstances of the case.” Pursuant to court notices official respondents have filed their comments/replies, which are taken on record, wherein it is undertaken that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hafeez Jagirani, advocate files power on behalf of the respondent No.8 and states at bar that respondent No.8 will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Learned AAG and DPG submits that in terms of prayer clause official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner.

Abdul Hafeez Jagirani, advocate files power on behalf of the respondent No.8 and states at bar that respondent No.8 will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Learned AAG and DPG submits that in terms of prayer clause official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant petition in view of the reply filed by the official respondents and statement made by the AAG & DPG. Order accordingly. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP concerned for compliance. JUDGE Nadir*
